arts.sum: AC Milan are facing a challenging situation ahead of their upcoming match against Juventus, following injuries sustained by key players during their recent game against Como. Christian Pulisic, Alvaro Morata, and Malick Thiaw were all forced to leave the pitch due to injury concerns, raising questions about their availability for the crucial clash with one of their fiercest rivals.
